Title: Killing Eve
Actors: Jodie Comer, Sandra Oh, Fiona Shaw
Plot: Eve is a bored, whip-smart security services operative whose desk-bound job doesn't fulfill her fantasies of being a spy. Villanelle is a talented killer, who clings to the luxuries her violent job affords her. These two fierce women, equally obsessed with each other, will go head to head in an epic game of cat and mouse, toppling the typical spy-action thriller.
Language: English, French, Spanish, Catalan, Russian, Polish, Romanian
Awards: Won 1 Primetime Emmy. 49 wins & 162 nominations total
